features: Ultra Soft Toothbrush: The extra soft toothbrushes for adults has more than 20,000 extra soft bristles, soft and comfortable, deeply and smoothly clean your teeth, remove food residue, plaque, and stains without hurting your tooth.

Ergonomic Design: The nano toothbrush has been ergonomically designed and tested thousands of times. The wavy toothbrush design is more suitable for teeth. Comfortable handle design can better adapt to your fingers, gently care for the your teeth.
Fits Most People: The soft bristle toothbrush is ideal for sensitive teeth, elderly, pregnant women, adults, men and people who wear braces, better to clean teeth without hurting the teeth.

Great for Traveling: These soft manual toothbrush is lightweight, easy to carry, can be put in toiletry bags, luggage, backpacks, purses. These extra soft toothbrush for adults is suitable for traveling, camping, outdoor.
What You Get: You will receive 2 pieces very soft toothbrush, sufficient quantity to meet your daily needs and replace requirement. Provide you with an pleasant experience to clean your teeth.
